title: Pakistani Officials Remain Hopeful About U.S.-Iran Talks
summary_full: The seizure of two cargo vessels by Iran in the Strait of Hormuz on Wednesday cast doubt on plans for a second round of talks in Pakistan’s capital.
summary_public: The seizure of two cargo vessels by Iran in the Strait of Hormuz on Wednesday cast doubt on plans for a second round of talks in Pakistan’s capital.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: seizure of two cargo vessels by Iran
